description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult human figure with exaggeratedly elongated arms and lower body, creating an unnatural, stretched appearance. The head and upper torso are relatively intact, showing a female face with long hair, but the rest of the body is unnaturally extended horizontally and vertically. The arms stretch outwards to an extreme degree, merging with the lower body, which tapers into a thin, elongated form. The clothing appears to be a long, form-fitting dress, but the garment is also heavily distorted along with the body. The overall form is surreal and abstract, lacking realistic anatomical proportions. The surface appears smooth and continuous, with no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: A surreal, distorted adult female figure with extremely elongated arms and lower body, wearing a long dress and featuring a smooth, continuous surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, upper torso, and the extreme horizontal stretching of the arms and dress.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated profile of the head, hair, and the dramatic extension of the arm and lower body.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head and the wide, stretched form of the upper body and dress.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the stretched arm and the side profile of the distorted body.
attribute_posture: standing with arms and lower body unnaturally stretched
